testsuite.name: com.sisense.footer.SisenseFooterTest

testcase.name: verifySupportPortalPageTitleUnderFooter
testcase.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Support Portal link under Footer successfully.
Sisense Footer Support Portal Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.

testsuite.system-out:
Open Browser
Click on Accept Cookie button.
Scroll to Footer section.
Click on Support Portal link under Footer successfully.
Sisense Footer Support Portal Page Title matched successfully.
Sisense Testing is passed.
